name: Plasma
description: Amoebic blobs wobbling in a petri dish — the cultures reshape themselves on every redraw.

code.style: --blob: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 7%; background: var(--blob); border-radius: @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%) / @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%) @rand(30%, 70%); opacity: 0.85; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
